ddls:
CREATE TABLE "loan_purposes" (
  "purpose_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loan purpose */,
  "purpose_name" TEXT /* Name of the loan purpose */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the loan purpose */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("purpose_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loan_statuses" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loan status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the loan status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the loan status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "verification_statuses" (
  "verification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each verification status */,
  "verification_name" TEXT /* Name of the verification status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the verification status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("verification_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loan_terms" (
  "term_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loan term */,
  "term_length" INTEGER /* Length of the loan term in months */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the loan term */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("term_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loan_grades" (
  "grade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loan grade */,
  "grade_name" TEXT /* Name of the loan grade */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the loan grade */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("grade_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loan_sub_grades" (
  "sub_grade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loan sub-grade */,
  "sub_grade_name" TEXT /* Name of the loan sub-grade */,
  "grade_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the loan grade */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the loan sub-grade */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sub_grade_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loan_addresses" (
  "address_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each address */,
  "borrower_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the borrower */,
  "address" TEXT /* Street address of the borrower */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the borrower resides */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the borrower resides */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the borrower */,
  "earliest_cr_line" TEXT /* Date of the earliest credit line */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the borrower's address */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the borrower's address */,
  "address_type" TEXT /* Type of address (e.g., home, work) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("address_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loan_transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "loan_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the loan */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., payment, status change) */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the transaction */,
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the new loan status */,
  "transaction_description" TEXT /* Description of the transaction */,
  "transaction_status" TEXT /* Status of the transaction (e.g., successful, failed) */,
  "processed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who processed the transaction */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the transaction was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the transaction was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loan_transactions_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("status_id") REFERENCES loan_statuses ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loan_transactions_processed_by FOREIGN KEY ("processed_by") REFERENCES loan_officers ("loan_officer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loan_officers" (
  "loan_officer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loan officer */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the loan officer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the loan officer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the loan officer */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the loan officer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the loan officer record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the loan officer record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("loan_officer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "underwriters" (
  "underwriter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each underwriter */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the underwriter */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the underwriter */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the underwriter */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the underwriter */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the underwriter record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the underwriter record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("underwriter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "risk_analysts" (
  "risk_analyst_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each risk analyst */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the risk analyst */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the risk analyst */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the risk analyst */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the risk analyst */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the risk analyst record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the risk analyst record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("risk_analyst_id")
)
